_comment: Tune these first before touching scanner logic. Start loose, tighten once you see how much noise comes through.
_min_volume_note: Absolute contract volume floor. Below this, ratios are meaningless (10 vol / 2 OI = 5x ratio but it's nothing).
_min_vol_oi_ratio_note: Today's volume as a multiple of existing open interest. 3x+ means most of today's activity is new positioning, not rolls.
_min_notional_note: volume * last_price * 100. Filters out small retail-sized clutter. $50k is a starting point, not gospel.
_max_dte_note: Days to expiration cap. Short-dated positioning suggests a near-term catalyst thesis (the PLTR example was ~2 weeks out).
_otm_only_note: If true, only flags out-of-the-money contracts (classic directional bet pattern). Set false to include ITM/ATM.
